result.reasoning: From step_1, the light gray piece added four times on page 18 of Lego 4852 is identified as part number 4211005 (2x2 light gray brick). Step_3 reports that the same piece (4211005) first appears on page 2 of the Lego 4855 manual. Thus, the page number is 2. Casing decision: The answer is a numeral, so no casing adjustment is needed.
